title: Less noise, better setups, better results
author: Independent_Gur8648
selftext:
In just three short months, I successfully grew this account from $25,000 to $576,600.

I did it! If you think this was easy, you’re mistaken. I have been trading for 20 years the first seven of which I spent operating almost entirely on my own. It is precisely this dedication and hard work that have enabled me to achieve what I have today!

So, how did I do it? Despite executing fewer trades and utilizing smaller position sizes compared to previous months, my performance remained excellent.

Here are a few tips:

First, I focused exclusively on trading within the first 90 minutes after the competition began, aiming to capture the optimal entry and exit points; after that window closed, I stopped trading for the day.

Second, I opted for smaller trade sizes rather than taking on large positions. This approach allowed me to gain a clearer perspective on market conditions and enabled me to hold my positions for longer durations. This benefit was particularly evident when managing open positions; in the past due to using larger position sizes I often felt compelled to sell my holdings prematurely.

Third, because I entered the competition with a relatively small capital allocation, my stress levels remained very low. I simply needed to focus on the first 90 minutes of the trading session, which made the entire process much lighter psychologically.

The market is vastly larger than either you or I. I am absolutely delighted to have achieved such results. However, I will never allow overconfidence to cloud my future trading decisions. I will not engage in blind trading merely to recoup past losses. I will avoid overtrading, and I will not take on excessive risk. My only objective is to show up on time every morning and strive to seize the best trading opportunities available
